step.name: ingest-alert
step.action: Parse payload; extract signal vector (error rate, saturation, tenant scope).

step.name: classify
step.action: Derive severity, blast_radius from signal + catalog.

step.name: route
step.action: Apply tree: severity × blast_radius × freshness → page / async / suppress.

step.name: audit
step.action: Write triage record to audit log; emit notification per route.
